title: Sweet & Spicy Ginger Dutch Stir-fry
description: A herbal, dense Dutch dish featuring a caramelized sugar sauce and spiced with ginger to provide a hangover cure.
instructions: Slice the onion and garlic finely.
Dice the ginger into thin strips and crush it lightly to release its flavors.
Season chicken with salt, cayenne pepper, soy sauce, water, and red pepper flakes.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken first, then stir-fry until golden brown on both sides.
Add sliced onion and cook until translucent. Stir in ginger strips, garlic, and red pepper flakes.
Pour in the brown sugar and soy sauce mixture. Bring to a boil and reduce heat to low, letting the sauce thicken slightly.
Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes or until chicken is fully cooked through and sauce has thickened enough to coat the back of a spoon.
Serve hot as a main course.
